message:
test(ensemble): improve test coverage from 73% to 76%

Add comprehensive unit tests for EnsembleManager and related components:

manager_test.go:
- NewEnsembleManager creation and defaults
- All helper methods (tmuxClient, sessionOrchestrator, etc.)
- SpawnEnsemble validation error paths
- assignModes with all strategies (round-robin, category, affinity, explicit)
- resolveEnsembleConfig with presets and mode refs
- applyConfigOverrides and validateResolvedConfig
- parseModeRefs and explicitModeIDs

assignment_test.go:
- paneLess and paneIndex all branches
- AssignByCategory edge cases (nil catalog, too many modes, default preferred)
- AssignRoundRobin edge cases (empty modes, empty panes)
- AssignExplicit edge cases (duplicates, fallback types, comma expansion)
- ValidateAssignments edge cases (empty fields, unknown modes)
- Helper function edge cases

checkpoint_test.go:
- CheckpointStore.WithLogger
- CheckpointStore.CleanOld with age-based filtering
- CheckpointStore.GetPendingModeIDs
- CheckpointManager.WithLogger
- CheckpointManager.RecordError
- CheckpointManager.MarkComplete with and without cleanup
- CheckpointManager.GetResumeState

Coverage increased from 73.1% to 75.9%. Remaining gap to 85% is
primarily due to functions requiring tmux mocking (SpawnEnsemble,
CaptureAll, injector functions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
